verses.1: When the LORD restored the captives of Zion, we were like dreamers.
verses.2: Then our mouths were filled with laughter, our tongues with shouts of joy. Then it was said among the nations, “The LORD has done great things for them.”
verses.3: The LORD has done great things for us; we are filled with joy.
verses.4: Restore our captives, O LORD, like streams in the Negev.
verses.5: Those who sow in tears will reap with shouts of joy.
verses.6: He who goes out weeping, bearing a trail of seed, will surely return with shouts of joy, carrying sheaves of grain.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
